news.headline: Students win $28.5M settlement against Walden University for predatory advertising, setting new precedent in for-profit education.
news.summary: A recent class-action lawsuit against a university resulted in a settlement of $28.5 million. This case has set a new precedent for addressing predatory advertising practices within for-profit education institutions.

news.headline: Docebo partners with Intercap to provide free e-learning to small charities and nonprofits in Canada and the US.
news.summary: In Toronto, Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO; TSX: DCBO), a prominent learning platform provider rooted in AI and innovation, is working with Intercap Impact, a segment of Intercap Equity Inc., to establish OWL (Open World Learning Inc.). OWL is a no-cost e-learning platform tailored for small charities and nonprofits in Canada and the US. This collaboration marks the company's commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and aims to provide valuable educational resources to these organizations.

news.headline: Adams Natural Resources Fund reports 10.2% net asset value return, outperforming benchmark by 0.7%. Shares returned 16.3%.
news.summary: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE: PEO) has disclosed its performance results for the nine months ending on September 30th, 2024. During this period, the total return on the company's net asset value, including reinvested dividends and capital gains, reached 10.2%. In comparison, the company's benchmark, consisting of the S&P 500 Energy Sector (80% weight) and the S&P 500 Materials Sector (20% weight), recorded a total return of 9.5%. Additionally, the total return on the market price of the company's shares for the same period stood at 16.3%.

news.headline: Dropbox (NASDAQ: DBX) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after market close, with conference call at 2:00 PM PT.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Dropbox, Inc. revealed plans to release its financial results for Q3 of 2024, ending on September 30. The report will be shared after market hours on November 7, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET, aimed at discussing the outcomes with investors. Interested parties can access a live webcast and call replay via the Dropbox investor relations site at http://investors.dropbox. Dropbox is listed on NASDAQ as DBX.

news.headline: Adams Diversified Equity Fund's 9-month results show 21.3% return on net asset value, behind S&P 500 at 22.1%. Market price up 24.9%.
news.summary: In Baltimore on October 17, 2024, Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) reported its performance for the nine months ending on September 30th. The total return on Adams Diversified Equity's net asset value, reinvesting dividends and capital gains, stood at 21.3%. This surpasses the S&P 500's 22.1% and Morningstar U.S. Large Blend category's 20.4%. The total return on the market price of the Fund's shares during this period was 24.9%.

news.headline: Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) to report Q2 FY2025 results ended Sept 30, 2024, on Nov 7, 2024, before US market opens. Conf call at 8am ET.
news.summary: WALTHAM, Mass.--Dynatrace disclosed that it is set to release its second-quarter financial results for fiscal 2025, which concluded on September 30, 2024, before the U.S. financial markets commence on November 7, 2024. As part of this announcement, Dynatrace will conduct a conference call and live webcast to elaborate on the company's financial performance and future prospects. The conference call is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on November 7, 2024.

news.headline: Supernus reports positive results from Phase 2 study of SPN-820 for adults with MDD. #MajorDepressiveDisorder #supernus
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2% in the past month, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.8%. The economy added 531,000 jobs in various sectors, exceeding economists' expectations. The labor force participation rate also increased to 61.6%, indicating more people actively seeking employment. These positive trends indicate a promising outlook for the country's job market and overall economy. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 0.4%, suggesting an improvement in wages for workers. The job gains were widespread, with notable increases in the leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, and manufacturing industries. Overall, the data reflects a strong recovery in the labor market and signals a positive trajectory for the nation's economic growth.

news.headline: Investcorp India Acquisition Corp changes name to Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp after shareholder approval.
news.summary: A company listed as Investcorp India Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: IVCA) declared a change in its corporate name to Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp post obtaining shareholder endorsement at an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on October 15, 2024. Following this nod, the company lodged an amendment to its Amended and Restated Memorandum and Articles of Association with the Cayman Islands Registrar of Companies to implement the new name. The alteration signifies a shift from the previous name to a new one aligning with its focus on AI technology.

news.headline: BILL (NYSE: BILL) to report FY Q1 financial results on Nov. 7, 2024, including revenue figures, closing market rates, and webcast details.
news.summary: San Jose, California - BILL, a prominent financial operations platform for small and midsize businesses (SMBs) trading on NYSE under BILL, is set to announce its financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluded on September 30, 2024, post-market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A webcast is scheduled to take place at 1:30pm PT (4:30pm ET) on the same day to delve into the outcomes. Detailed financial outcomes and the webcast link will be available on the BILL investor relations page.

news.headline: EVERTEC (NYSE: EVTC) declares $0.05/share quarterly dividend; to be paid on December 6, 2024 to shareholders.
news.summary: EVERTEC, Inc. (NYSE: EVTC) based in San Juan, Puerto Rico, recently stated that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share on October 17, 2024. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on December 6, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of October 28, 2024. The company's Board foresees continuing to declare this dividend regularly in upcoming quarters, yet these declarations are dependent on Board approval and could be modified based on business circumstances.

This call will provide a comprehensive review of the company's financial performance during the third quarter of the fiscal year. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to tune in to the webcast to gain insights into the company's earnings, growth strategies, and future outlook. The webcast will be accessible to all interested parties and will serve as a platform for the company to communicate its financial results and performance metrics. news.headline: iLearningEngines to showcase AI technology at ITC Vegas in October and Insurance Innovators Summit in Nov. #AI #insurance
news.summary: iLearningEngines will showcase its vision for the AI-enabled Insurance Industry at two major events - ITC Vegas in October and Insurance Innovators Summit in London in November. This highlights the company's strategic focus on shaping the future of insurance through artificial intelligence technology. These events provide a platform for iLearningEngines to present its innovative solutions and thought leadership to industry professionals and stakeholders. The company's active involvement in these key conferences underscores its commitment to driving advancements in the insurance sector through AI.

news.headline: Fresh2 Group Ltd. facing delisting from Nasdaq for non-compliance with filing requirements; failed to submit required forms on time.
news.summary: In New York City, on October 17, 2024, Fresh2 Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: FRES), a B2B e-commerce and supply chain management company in the restaurant and food industry, disclosed that it received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq. The letter, received on October 16, 2024, stated that Fresh2 did not meet Nasdaq's filing requirements under Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). This was due to Fresh2's failure to submit its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2023, and its Forms 10-Q for the quarters ending on March 31 and June 30, 2024, within the specified deadlines.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024. They are a global company listed on NASDAQ as CLPT.
news.summary: A company called ClearPoint Neuro, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLPT) based in Solana Beach, California, will be releasing its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7th, after the market closes. ClearPoint Neuro is a global company that specializes in devices, cell, and gene therapy support, providing precise navigation for procedures involving the brain and spine.

news.headline: 23andMe introduces feature helping African Americans trace roots to 200+ post-slavery communities in the South.
news.summary: A recently introduced feature called African American Genetic Groups is providing customers with detailed information on their ancestral connections dating back to before the early-to-mid-20th century migrations. This feature traces genetic ties to over 200 communities in Southern states, offering insights into the diverse heritage of African Americans.

(NASDAQ: AWRE), a leading global biometric platform company employing data science, machine learning, and artificial intelligence to address business and identity issues through biometrics, announced a forthcoming webcast on October 30, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. The official press release containing the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 will be released on the same day after the market closes.

news.headline: Bel-sar shows promise in treating NMIBC with 4/5 patients achieving complete response, highlighting potential efficacy.
news.summary: In a recent study, 80% of patients within a subset with low grade disease showed complete responses during clinical trials. Additionally, there was observed evidence of a bladder urothelial field effect in non-target tumors. The results are quite promising with 4 out of 5 patients experiencing positive outcomes.

news.headline: Kairous Acquisition Corp. Limited extends business combination deadline by 1 month with $50,000 contribution to Trust Account.
news.summary: Singapore, Oct.  17, 2024 - Kairous Acquisition Corp. Limited (NASDAQ: KACL) shared today that its initial public offering sponsor, Kairous Asia Limited, has contributed $50,000 to extend the Company's deadline for finalizing a business combination by one month. The deadline has been extended from October 16, 2024, to November 16, 2024. This sum has been deposited into the Company's Trust Account and is represented by a promissory note with no interest. In the event of a merger, the promissory note will convert to the Company's shares at $10.10 per share. This extension aims to grant the Company additional time to successfully conclude a business combination.

news.headline: ABM Group's new General Counsel Miranda Tolar replaces Andrea Newborn; Tolar was SVP & Deputy GC.
news.summary: The Executive Vice President and General Counsel, Andrea Newborn, is set to retire. After her departure, Miranda Tolar, the current Senior Vice President and Deputy General Counsel, will take over as the new EVP General Counsel. This transition marks a significant change within the organization's legal leadership.

news.headline: CarGurus (Nasdaq: CARG) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 7, after market close. #carGurus #financialresults
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, CarGurus, Inc. (Nasdaq: CARG), the leading digital auto platform for new and used vehicle transactions, shared plans to release its financial performance data for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. The report will be made public after the market closes on November 7, 2024. CarGurus is identified as the most popular online destination for car sales, attracting a significant number of visitors seeking to purchase or sell vehicles.

news.headline: ACM Research will release Q3 2024 revenue range on Oct 30, 2024, with full financial results on Nov 7, 2024.
news.summary: ACM Research, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACMR) based in Fremont, California, disclosed that it is set to unveil its estimated revenue range for the third quarter of 2024 prior to the opening of the U.S. market on October 30, 2024. This release aligns with the reporting requirements of its main operating subsidiary, ACM Research (Shanghai), Inc., to the Shanghai Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Bank OZK reported $177.1 million net income for Q3 2024, an 8th consecutive record. The total assets were $37.44 billion.
news.summary: Bank OZK reported a net income of $177.1 million for Q3 2024, an 4.4% increase from Q3 2023 and $522.1 million for the first nine months of 2024, a 3.7% increase from the same period in 2023. Diluted earnings per common share were $1.55 for Q3 2024 and $4.58 for the first nine months of 2024. Provision for credit losses was $46.4 million in Q3 2024. Total assets reached $37.44 billion by Sept 30, 2024. Loans increased by 15.3% to $29.22 billion, deposits increased by 19.6% to $30.57 billion, common stockholders' equity was $5.25 billion, and tangible common stockholders' equity was $4.59 billion. Key ratios like total common stockholders' equity to total assets was 14.03% and total tangible common stockholders' equity to total tangible assets was 12.49% by Sept 30, 2024. Nonperforming loans ratio increased to 0.60% in Q3 2024. A conference call regarding the results was scheduled for further discussion on October 18, 2024. Visit www.ozk.com for more information.

news.headline: Sight Sciences to share Q3 financial results on Nov 7, 2024 - Company listed on Nasdaq (SGHT); earnings to be discussed in conference call.
news.summary: Sight Sciences, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company based in Menlo Park, California, specializing in eyecare technology, is set to release its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024, after the market closes. The management will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. This announcement was made on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Flywire will release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call at 5:00pm ET. CEO, COO, and CFO will lead the call.
news.summary: Flywire Corporation (Nasdaq: FLYW) is set to unveil its Q3 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, after the market closes. The company, specializing in global payments technology, will hold a conference call at 5:00pm ET on the same day to delve into the results. Leading the call will be CEO Mike Massaro, President and COO Rob Orgel, and CFO Cosmin Pitigoi. This announcement was made in Boston on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: UTime Limited (Nasdaq: WTO) received Nasdaq letter due to share price below $1 for 30 days.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, UTime Limited, a mobile device manufacturer traded on Nasdaq under the symbol WTO, received a notification from Nasdaq due to its stock price falling below $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days. This means UTime no longer complies with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) regarding minimum bid price. UTime is dedicated to providing affordable products globally and aiding low-income individuals in established and developing markets.

news.headline: Netflix gains 5M subscribers, boosting revenue to $9.8B in the quarter - a 15% increase from last year.
news.summary: The latest enhancements contributed to a surge in revenue, reaching $9.8 billion in the current period, reflecting a substantial 15% rise compared to the corresponding period the previous year.

news.headline: Compound feeds market set to grow to $636 billion by 2029 at a 3.8% CAGR, up from $526.6 billion in 2024, driven by demand for animal nutrition.
news.summary: A recent study by BCC Research projects a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.8%, indicating market expansion from $526.6 billion in 2024 to $636.0 billion by 2029. The surge is attributed to increasing interest in premium animal nutrition and feed supplements. The report highlights Boston, and emphasizes that compound feeds, which are tailored nutrient mixtures, play a crucial role in catering to animal dietary needs.

news.headline: Discover local artwork at markets and galleries across North Dakota this fall. Beauty beyond badlands. Date: Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: This autumn in North Dakota, residents and visitors have the opportunity to discover the talent of local artists and makers at various markets and galleries. With the arrival of fall on October 17, 2024, in Bismarck, individuals can immerse themselves in the diverse creations showcased across the state. From paintings and sculptures to handmade goods, there is a range of artistic expressions waiting to be explored. Beyond the picturesque landscapes, the artistic community in North Dakota adds to the beauty of the season. Explore these unique works as a total of #number markets and galleries across the state open their doors to showcase the creativity and craftsmanship of local talent. Enjoy the fusion of artistic expression and autumnal beauty during this time in North Dakota.

news.summary: Scheduled call on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. EST.

news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Anika Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIK), a leading global company focused on joint preservation in early intervention orthopedics, revealed plans to release its third quarter financial results on Thursday, October 31, 2024. news.headline: Freehold Royalties announces dividend of Cdn. $0.09/share, payable on Nov. 15, 2024, to shareholders on record on Oct. 31.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 17, 2024, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold) (TSX: FRU) has declared a dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share. This dividend will be disbursed on November 15, 2024, to shareholders listed on record as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Marten Transport's Q3 2024 net income is $3.8M (5 cents/share), down from $13.6M (17 cents/share) in Q3 2023. Nine-month period net income is $21.3M (26 cents/share) in 2024, down from $58.0M (71 cents/share) in 2023.
news.summary: In Mondovi, Wisconsin, on October 17, 2024, Marten Transport, Ltd. (Nasdaq/GS:MRTN) released their financial results. In this quarter ending on September 30, 2024, the company reported a net income of $3.8 million, equivalent to 5 cents per diluted share. This shows a decline from the third quarter of 2023, where the net income was $13.6 million, or 17 cents per diluted share. Looking at the nine months leading up to September 30, 2024, the company's net income was $21.3 million (26 cents per diluted share). In comparison, the same period in 2023 saw a higher net income of $58.0 million, with 71 cents per diluted share.

news.headline: TPI Composites to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time).
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona-based TPI Composites, Inc. stated that it will disclose its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, post-market closure. This announcement will be succeeded by a conference call scheduled for 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. TPI, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TPIC, is preparing to share its performance data with stakeholders, investors, and the public regarding its operations and financial standing for the specified period. The company's leaders are anticipated to delve into key metrics and insights during the post-earnings call, offering a comprehensive overview of their Q3 performance.

news.headline: Bank OZK reports $177.1 million Q3 earnings, a 4.4% rise from 2023, with $522.1 million in 9-month 2024 earnings.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on October 17, 2024, Bank OZK disclosed that its net income available to common stockholders in the third quarter of 2024 reached $177.1 million, marking the eighth straight quarterly record. This figure represents a 4.4% surge from the $169.7 million reported in the third quarter of 2023. Over the initial nine months of 2024, the net income available to common stockholders totaled $522.1 million, showing a 3.7% rise from the $503.5 million recorded in the first nine months of 2023. The Bank trades on the Nasdaq under the symbol OZK.

news.headline: Bank OZK released management comments on Q3 & first 9 months of 2024. More details on their website.
news.summary: The management comments for the third quarter and first nine months of 2024 for Bank OZK, listed on Nasdaq as OZK, can now be accessed on the Bank's investor relations website, https://ir.ozk.com. This information was released from Little Rock, Arkansas on October 17, 2024.
